ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (participant or organizer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (foreign key to the users table) */,
  "bib_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the participant for the event */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the participant resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the participant resides */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the participant resides */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact name and relationship */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Emergency contact phone number */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the participant has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is held */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., 10K race, marathon) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event in kilometers */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_waves" (
  "wave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wave */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event (foreign key to the events table) */,
  "wave_name" TEXT /* Name of the wave (e.g., elite, general, etc.) */,
  "wave_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the wave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_events" (
  "participant_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant-event pair */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant (foreign key to the participants table) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event (foreign key to the events table) */,
  "wave_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wave (foreign key to the event_waves table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_events_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_events_wave_id FOREIGN KEY ("wave_id") REFERENCES event_waves ("wave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant's performance */,
  "participant_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant-event pair (foreign key to the participant_events table) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant started the event */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant finished the event */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the participant in the event */,
  "gender_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant within their gender */,
  "age_group_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant within their age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_performance_participant_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_event_id") REFERENCES participant_events ("participant_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant (foreign key to the participants table) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event (foreign key to the events table) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant (foreign key to the participants table) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event (foreign key to the events table) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal, etc.) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the participant */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_data" (
  "timing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing data point */,
  "participant_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant-event pair (foreign key to the participant_events table) */,
  "split_time" TEXT /* Time at a specific split point */,
  "split_distance" REAL /* Distance at a specific split point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timing data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_data_participant_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_event_id") REFERENCES participant_events ("participant_event_id")
)
